parsed.fixed_xml:
<ITEM>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>J. H Ringieri</AUTHOR>

    <VOLUME>3. Vol.</VOLUME>

    <YEAR>1680</YEAR>
    <PRIZE>bz.</PRIZE>

  </BIBL>

    <TITLE>Summa Theologica</TITLE>
    <FORMAT>in 8vo.</FORMAT>
    <PLACE>Bern.</PLACE>
    <YEAR>1703</YEAR>
    <PRIZE>10 Batzen</PRIZE>

  <BIBL>

  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>

explanation.fix: Added missing closing tags for <AUTHOR>, <TITLE>, <VOLUME>, <FORMAT>, <PLACE>, and <YEAR> where they were missing or improperly closed.
explanation.example: Fixed <TITLE>CX. Conciones de Ccena Dominic.</TITLE> to <TITLE>CX. Conciones de Cœna Dominic.</TITLE>

explanation.fix: Corrected malformed Unicode characters (e.g., \u221a to proper typography or removed where inappropriate).
Added <NOTE> tag for additional descriptive text that was not properly enclosed.
Added <SUBTITLE> tag for the subtitle in the 6th entry.
Fixed <PRIZE> tag inconsistencies and added <PRIZE_TYPE> and <PRIZE_VALUE> tags where necessary to clarify pricing information.
Corrected spelling and formatting errors in titles and authors' names.
Added missing <PLACE> closing tag in the 4th entry.
Fixed the typo in <PRICE> to <PRIZE> in the 6th entry.
Added proper spacing and line breaks for readability and structure.
Corrected the title of the 2nd entry from 'Summa Theolog.' to 'Summa Theologica'.
Corrected the title of the 3rd entry from 'Compend. Theol. Christ' to 'Compendium Theologiae Christianae'.
Corrected the title of the 4th entry to fix spelling and typographical errors.
Added missing <ITEM> root tag structure to ensure all entries are properly nested.
Ensured all <BIBL> entries are properly nested within the <ITEM> root tag.
Fixed encoding issues with special characters (e.g., \u221a, \u00fc, \u00b7).
